analysis.reasoning: Core message: Lavrov claims the West wants Russia to be a pliable territory serving Western interests, but Russia will pursue an independent foreign policy defending national interests and justice internationally. Evaluation: RU1 (West immoral/hostile): Yes—portrays the West as self-serving and attempting to dominate Russia, positioning Russia as resisting hostile/immoral pressure. RU2 (Russia leads alternative system): Partially implied by "independent foreign policy" and "justice on intl stage," but no explicit mention of alternative multilateral structures or non-Western cooperation; emphasis is on independence rather than leading an alternative system, so not strong enough. RU3 (Russia benevolent partner): Not focused on partnership or aid; more on autonomy. RU4 (Russian history admirable): Not about history. RU5 (Russia at forefront): No concrete achievements cited. RU6 (culture/nature/heritage): Not relevant. Conclusion: The tweet promotes RU1.
